blockingIssues.description: Market cap and FDV remain null in CASH TDP data hook; required populated stats are incomplete.
Swap defaults still resolve through Ethereum-native currency path, so CASH is not the default token in the swap flow.

appliedUpdates.description: Corrected .factory/library/architecture.md to reflect that apps/trading/src/cash/hooks contains 14 hooks, matching web/hooks source-of-truth.
Added .factory/library/aptos-derived-wallet-ethers-compat.md documenting ethers v5/v6 incompatibility impact on Aptos derived-wallet flows in apps/trading.
Added .factory/library/uniswap-shortenaddress-aptos-gap.md documenting that Uniswap shortenAddress utility does not support Aptos addresses.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Replace unconditional `pnpm -r typecheck && pnpm -r test` validation instruction with mission-aware command selection (prefer `.factory/services.yaml` scoped validators when present).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: All three core-port reviews flagged mismatch between skill guidance and scoped validation policy in mission AGENTS/services.yaml, causing avoidable failures against known-broken suites.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add an explicit checklist item for non-EVM ports: verify address-format utility compatibility and avoid EVM-only helpers for Aptos address display/default-token flows.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: cash-tdp-full-data review found blocking ETH-default swap behavior and non-blocking Aptos address rendering regression from reuse of EVM-centric utilities/components.

rejectedObservations.observation: Repeated reports that fork-worker validation guidance conflicts with scoped mission validators.
